//: All paths/commands the shell needs. Edit these for your machine.
//slideProjectDir: Folder holding the open-slide project. Relative to this app dir, or absolute. Run `npm run init-slides` once to scaffold it.
//slideDev: Runs `open-slide dev` (the project's npm script) inside slideProjectDir.
//opencode: We spawn `<bin> serve` ourselves with cwd=slideProjectDir. bin is the opencode-ai npm binary (version-pinned in package.json, downloaded on npm install); a bare name like "opencode" would resolve via PATH instead. Path bins are resolved against the app root. Authenticate once with `opencode auth login`. model format is provider/modelID.
